description:
Open the Landsat multispectral image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif in ESA SNAP. Create three virtual bands with the following names and expressions:
- 'TC_Brightness': (0.30 * band_4) + (0.28 * band_3) + (0.47 * band_2) + (0.51 * band_1)
- 'TC_Greenness': (-0.28 * band_4) - (0.24 * band_3) + (0.54 * band_2) - (0.06 * band_1)
- 'TC_Wetness': (0.15 * band_4) + (0.20 * band_3) + (0.33 * band_2) - (0.65 * band_1)
Save the product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/tasseled_cap.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/tasseled_cap.tif. Export an RGB image view (Red: TC_Brightness, Green: TC_Greenness, Blue: TC_Wetness) as a PNG to ~/snap_exports/tct_visualization.png.
